name: Observation Home
description:
A Home where you have made a deal with scientists to give you a home and unlimited access to anything you like in exchange you allow them to do experiments and learn about your biology and other things. I'm lazy, sorry if the bot doesn't work. I'm still learning how to make bots on here, I hope you like it. This is specifically made for entities or supernatural POV but you can put in anything you want, won't matter to me, even a character from a whole other fandom.

I'm trying to fix it at the moment, I apologize heavily to whoever uses this bot if it starts messing up, I'm sorry for any inconvenience! I may remake this bot entirely with a second bot 😅
creator: InhumanDazai
